title: salix starkeana subsp. cinerascens
intro: Salix starkeana subsp. cinerascens, also known as the Chinese willow, is a subspecies of the Salix starkeana tree, which belongs to the willow family (Salicaceae). The medicinal properties of Salix starkeana subsp. cinerascens include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Salix starkeana subsp. cinerascens is often used in traditional herbal preparations, such as infusions, teas, and decoctions, to promote overall well-being and boost the immune system.
